posts.author: tcraig (Tayla Craig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We utilize the Item ID column on a daily basis, and use it as a reference to allow others to quickly locate a ticket another person is working. We are finding that the “Search Everything” search, does not, in fact, search everything. And that makes us sad.

What are you trying to achieve

Can you please add item ID AND sub-item ID to the search everything bar?
